meaning: n.广场,露天汽车停车场,购物中心
examples: Their rendezvous would be the Plaza Hotel.
Across the busy plaza, vendors sell hot dogs and croissant sandwiches.
You can walk down Sproul Plaza.
Some of the clothes produced in the Rana Plaza building were made for Western retailers.
Start off at Thailand Plaza (www.thailandplazala.com), a market next to a kitchy, Oriental-looking tower.
